creator: wollman@khavrinen.lcs.mit.edu
text:
<<On Fri, 22 Aug 1997 16:34:56 +1000 (EST), Andrew Reilly <reilly@zeta.org.au> said:

>> Environment:

> 	HTTP_PROXY=http-proxy.zeta.org.au:80

My guess would be that your proxy server doesn't attempt to return a
valid `Last-Modified:' header for FTP files.  That is the only source
`fetch' has to set the ctime.

-GAWollman
